subcodes.first_line: O thou who art steadfast in the Covenant! Open thy hearing ear that thou mayest hearken to the call of the Supreme Concourse, and be thou so stirred and quickened in the celestial feast [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان گوش هوش بگشا تا سروش ملا اعلی شنوی و چنان بجوش آای که در بزم
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @review of publications
